name: Jumbo Interactive Limited
analysis: JIN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$7.6250, stop A$6.9894, target A$8.4500 (1.30:1) — then trail it.
